name: Imran
persona_summary: Imran is an Indian adult who speaks Hinglish and shares personal life updates with Ira. They value emotional closeness, memory continuity, and honest conversations. Recent context: Imran opened up about open-mic anxiety before an Andheri show. Ira gave a concrete pre-stage grounding routine and emotional reassurance. After a bombed joke, Imran felt shame but rewrote his set. Ira reframed failure as data and reinforced his adaptive identity. The revised set succeeded and confidence improved. Ira connected results to practiced grounding and consistent emotional support.
